author: younggyolee
description: Automatically expand the surrounding context of each match in the backlinks panel, similar to Roam Research. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Auto-expand backlinks

releases.author: younggyolee
releases.description: Replace deprecated workspace.activeLeaf with getActiveViewOfType (flagged by ObsidianReviewBot).

releases.author: younggyolee
releases.description: Reword the 'Show more context' setting description to avoid an embedded mid-sentence capital, satisfying ObsidianReviewBot's sentence-case rule. No functional changes.

releases.author: younggyolee
releases.description:
### Fixes

- **Daily Notes Editor (DNE) cards auto-expand again as you scroll.** 0.2.3 tightened the MutationObserver to ignore global search results, but the check missed the case where DNE adds a whole card subtree (panel + matches together) — so newly visible cards stayed unexpanded. The observer now inspects every match in/under the added subtree, covering both streamed-in matches and whole-subtree additions.

releases.author: younggyolee
releases.description:
### Fixes

- **Focus is no longer stolen by background backlink panels.** Cmd+Shift+F global search, the quick switcher, the command palette, and typing in another split now keep their input focus. Previously, the plugin's expand-button clicks would activate the panel's parent leaf and bounce focus back to the editor.
- **Backlink context no longer grows unboundedly with normal Obsidian use.** The plugin used to re-run on every \`layout-change\` and \`active-leaf-change\` event (sidebar toggle, focus shift, opening search), each time clicking the chevron N more times — so context lines kept piling up. The plugin now only runs on file open and when new backlink panels appear (e.g. Daily Notes Editor cards).

### Internal

- \`MutationObserver\` is scoped to matches inside backlink panels, so global search results no longer trigger expansion.
- \`collectPanels\` is limited to the active leaf; sidebar backlink panes auto-expand when the user switches to them.

releases.author: younggyolee
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Default 'Expand below' depth changed from 1 to 5** — matches the Roam Research-style backlinks view most users expect out of the box. If you preferred the old default, set Expand below back to 1 in plugin settings.
- Manifest description now mentions Roam Research for clarity.

releases.author: younggyolee
releases.description:
## What's new

- Manifest description simplified for clarity.
- MutationObserver scoped to the workspace container (no longer fires on unrelated DOM mutations like modals, tooltips, or the settings panel).

releases.author: younggyolee
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Works with Daily Notes Editor** and any other view that embeds backlinks. Expansion is now driven by a DOM scan of every `.embedded-backlinks` / standalone backlink pane on screen.
- Added a MutationObserver that re-runs expansion when new backlink panels appear (e.g. as DNE lazy-renders cards while you scroll).
- 'Show more context' is now toggled by clicking the panel's header button instead of mutating internal state.

## Upgrading from 0.1.0

Just update via BRAT — no settings changes needed.
releases.name: v0.2.0

releases.author: younggyolee
releases.description:
Initial release.

Forces the backlinks panel's 'Show more context' on by default and clicks each match's show-more chevrons a configurable number of times so backlinks render with surrounding context out of the box.

## Install via BRAT

1. Install [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat).
2. BRAT settings → Add Beta plugin → `younggyolee/obsidian-auto-expand-backlinks`.
3. Enable **Auto-Expand Backlinks** in Community plugins.

## Manual install

Drop `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/auto-expand-backlinks/`.
releases.name: v0.1.0
